allow: PowerShell($gh = \(Get-Command gh -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\).Source; if \($gh\) { Write-Host "gh found: $gh" } else { Write-Host "gh not in PATH" }; if \($gh\) { & $gh --version })

PowerShell(try { $r = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "https://api.github.com/repos/Damaris200/AgroSense_AI/contributors" -Headers @{"User-Agent"="Damaris200"; "Accept"="application/vnd.github+json"}; $r | Select-Object login, contributions | Format-Table } catch { Write-Host "ERROR: $_" })

PowerShell(try { $r = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "https://api.github.com/repos/Damaris200/AgroSense_AI/pulls/7/commits" -Headers @{"User-Agent"="Damaris200"; "Accept"="application/vnd.github+json"}; $r | ForEach-Object { [PSCustomObject]@{ sha = $_.sha.Substring\(0,8\); author = $_.commit.author.name; coauthors = \($_.commit.message -split "`n" | Where-Object { $_ -match "Co-authored-by" }\) -join "; " } } | Format-Table -AutoSize -Wrap } catch { Write-Host "ERROR: $_" })

PowerShell($h = @{"User-Agent"="Damaris200"; "Accept"="application/vnd.github+json"}; Write-Host "=== Contributors API ==="; try { \(Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "https://api.github.com/repos/Damaris200/AgroSense_AI/contributors" -Headers $h\) | Select-Object login, id, contributions | Format-Table } catch { Write-Host "ERROR: $_" }; Write-Host "=== Contributors API \(anon=true to include all\) ==="; try { \(Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "https://api.github.com/repos/Damaris200/AgroSense_AI/contributors?anon=true" -Headers $h\) | Select-Object login, name, email, contributions | Format-Table } catch { Write-Host "ERROR: $_" }; Write-Host "=== Collaborators ==="; try { \(Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "https://api.github.com/repos/Damaris200/AgroSense_AI/collaborators" -Headers $h\) | Select-Object login | Format-Table } catch { Write-Host "ERROR \(likely needs auth\): $_" })

PowerShell($h = @{"User-Agent"="Damaris200"; "Accept"="application/vnd.github+json"}; Write-Host "=== Search GitHub user 'claude' ==="; try { \(Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "https://api.github.com/users/claude" -Headers $h\) | Select-Object login, id, html_url, created_at | Format-List } catch { Write-Host "ERROR: $_" }; Write-Host "=== Recent commits on main with co-author or unusual author ==="; try { \(Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "https://api.github.com/repos/Damaris200/AgroSense_AI/commits?per_page=10" -Headers $h\) | ForEach-Object { [PSCustomObject]@{ sha=$_.sha.Substring\(0,8\); author=$_.commit.author.email; login=\($_.author.login -as [string]\); has_claude=\($_.commit.message -match "claude" -or $_.commit.message -match "anthropic"\) } } | Format-Table -AutoSize } catch { Write-Host "ERROR: $_" })

PowerShell(Get-ChildItem -Path services -Recurse -File -Filter "prisma.config.ts" | ForEach-Object { Write-Host "Removing: $\($_.FullName\)"; Remove-Item $_.FullName -Force }; Write-Host "---"; foreach \($svc in @\('weather-service','soil-service','ai-service','notification-service','analytics-service'\)\) { $path = "services\\$svc\\prisma\\migrations"; if \(Test-Path $path\) { Write-Host "Removing: $path"; Remove-Item $path -Recurse -Force } })

PowerShell($ErrorActionPreference = 'Stop'; foreach \($svc in @\('auth-service','farm-service','weather-service'\)\) { Write-Host "=== $svc ==="; Set-Location "services\\$svc"; bun install 2>&1 | Select-Object -Last 8; Set-Location ..\\.. })

PowerShell(foreach \($svc in @\('auth-service','farm-service','weather-service','soil-service','ai-service','notification-service','analytics-service','api-gateway','orchestrator-service'\)\) { Write-Host "=== $svc ==="; Set-Location "services\\$svc"; bun install | Select-Object -Last 6; Set-Location ..\\.. })
PowerShell(Remove-Item -Force docker\\init-databases.sql; if \(-not \(Get-ChildItem docker\)\) { Remove-Item docker -Force }; Write-Host "Cleaned up orphan docker/init-databases.sql")

PowerShell(foreach \($svc in @\('farm-service','weather-service','soil-service','ai-service','notification-service','analytics-service','api-gateway','orchestrator-service'\)\) { Write-Host ""; Write-Host "=== $svc ==="; Set-Location "services\\$svc"; if \(Test-Path bun.lock\) { Remove-Item -Force bun.lock }; if \(Test-Path bun.lockb\) { Remove-Item -Force bun.lockb }; if \(Test-Path node_modules\) { Remove-Item -Recurse -Force node_modules }; bun install | Select-Object -Last 4; Set-Location ..\\.. })

PowerShell($results = @\(\); foreach \($svc in @\('auth-service','farm-service','weather-service','soil-service','ai-service','notification-service','analytics-service'\)\) { Set-Location "services\\$svc"; $output = bunx prisma generate 2>&1 | Out-String; if \($LASTEXITCODE -eq 0\) { $results += "$svc : OK" } else { $results += "$svc : FAIL`n$output" }; Set-Location ..\\.. }; $results | ForEach-Object { Write-Host $_ })

PowerShell($results = @\(\); foreach \($svc in @\('auth-service','farm-service','weather-service','soil-service','ai-service','notification-service','analytics-service','api-gateway','orchestrator-service'\)\) { Set-Location "services\\$svc"; $output = bunx tsc --noEmit 2>&1 | Out-String; if \($LASTEXITCODE -eq 0\) { $results += "$svc : OK" } else { $results += "$svc : FAIL"; $results += $output } ; Set-Location ..\\.. }; $results | ForEach-Object { Write-Host $_ })

PowerShell($results = @\(\); foreach \($svc in @\('auth-service','farm-service','weather-service','soil-service','notification-service'\)\) { Set-Location "services\\$svc"; $output = bun test 2>&1 | Out-String; if \($LASTEXITCODE -eq 0\) { $results += "$svc : OK"; $tail = \($output -split "`n" | Select-Object -Last 3\) -join "`n"; $results += $tail } else { $results += "$svc : FAIL"; $results += \($output -split "`n" | Select-Object -Last 30\) -join "`n" }; Set-Location ..\\.. }; $results | ForEach-Object { Write-Host $_ })
